---
title: "Grafikon Centili"
author: "Rok"
format: docx
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# --- Ustvari mapo output, če ne obstaja ---
os.makedirs("output", exist_ok=True)

# --- Preberi Excel ---
df = pd.read_excel(
    "Grafikoni.xlsx", 
    sheet_name="grafCentili", 
    usecols="P:S", 
    skiprows=2, 
    nrows=14
)

# Odstrani prazne vrednosti v stolpcu Test
df = df.dropna(subset=["Test"])

y_cols = ["ZmigajSdV", "Regija", "Država"]

# --- Centriranje na 50, na y-osi pokažemo dejanske vrednosti ---
df_centered = df.copy()
for col in y_cols:
    df_centered[col + "_delta"] = df_centered[col] - 50  # Stolpci nad/pod 50

x = df_centered["Test"]
colors = ["#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c"]
width = 0.2
x_pos = np.arange(len(x))

# --- Risanje stolpičnega grafikona ---
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,6))

for i, col in enumerate(y_cols):
    ax.bar(
        x_pos + i*width, 
        df_centered[col + "_delta"], 
        width, 
        label=col, 
        color=colors[i]
    )

# Y-osi prilagodimo, da kaže dejanske vrednosti (0–100)
y_ticks = np.arange(0, 101, 10)
ax.set_yticks(y_ticks - 50)  # ker je 50 v sredini
ax.set_yticklabels([str(t) for t in y_ticks])

# Nastavitve osi in legende
ax.set_xticks(x_pos + width)
ax.set_xticklabels(x, rotation=45)
ax.set_ylabel("Povprečni centil")
ax.axhline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.8)  # 50 kot srednja črta
ax.legend()

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("output/grafikon.png")
plt.show()
```
